      A year later we accidentally meet this man on the street. We ask him how he is doing. He says, "I am married. My girlfriend and I got married. We have one child and a second one is on the way. My neck does not hurt. The bump never came back. And my business is flying."

       

      Miracles like this... in inexplicable abundance.

      MIND MACHINES

      We have discovered that one Survival Strategy is to install a Mind Machine, usually located between the ear and the brain, sometimes located between the brain and the mouth, sometimes both places, sometimes even with different types of Mind Machines.

       

      You may installed have a Mind Machine in your own mind...

       

      We have distinguished several different kinds of Mind Machines, for example, the Time Delay. Someone asks you a question or says something challenging or dangerous to you. The words enter your Time Delay Mind Machine. You don't even hear the words for 15 to 30 seconds later, so at first you seem stupid, completely unresponsive, and eventually what you might say is so out of synchrony with what is happening around you 30 seconds later that you seem harmless, powerless, not dangerous... so they do not have to kill you. You are safe! The Mind Machine worked to save your life.

       

      However, later on in life (after being 18 years old) having a Mind Machine becomes an expensive burden to carry around with you. It essentially blocks you from the Present, and therefore from Adulthood.

       

      Mind Machines can be bypassed with a short-circuit, then after 6 months of disuse they dissolve into nothingness.

       

      Bypassing a Mind Machine is a Self Surgery, meaning that you do the surgery on yourself - using the same capability you used to install it in the first places. However, the Self Surgery works far better - quicker and more certainly - if you have a Space Holder who can walk you through the procedure while you do it.

       

      Other style Mind Machines include Fog Horn, Confusion, Switch Around, Sleep Wave, Complexify, etc. It is best to study the Mind Machine website and get with someone who has done the self-surgery on themselves already before you try to do it on yourself or anyone else. But definitely do the Mind Machine Surgery. It has changed so many people's lives already.

      EVERYBODY HAS LITTLE WEIRD THINGS GOING ON THAT ARE SO IMPORTANT TO CHECK

      During Possibility Coaching sessions I have spoken with Clients about knacks and weird experiences they have that modern culture and especially modern schooling neither understands nor respects. Yet diving into and through these bizarre formulations with them has unfolded so much new potential for their life. For example, in the last week alone I found:

      • A person who accompanies rabbits listening to Sage Brush songs in the desert all day long.
      • A person who sees and talks to ghostly apparitions and receives long-ignored messages from them.
      • A person who built a bizarre memetic machine into their energetic body to compress themselves into a freezing cold lifeless ball so that their alcoholic step-father does not judge their aliveness as stupid and crazy, then use that as an excuse to beat and yell at their mother.
      • A person who cut themselves off from their magic in order to be allowed into ordinary circles.
      • And so on.

      Your job is to create Clarity and Possibility for your Client no matter what the weirdness factor of the world they live in. If you get hints of such things going on for a person, put them on the table to explore with your Client. Make a safe place and take a look at these things together. Find out what is really going on and what needs to be completed or transformed.

      EXPAND THE BOX TRAINING

      If your Client has not participated in Expand The Box training before their Possibility Coaching session with you, then most of their first dozen or so Possibility Coaching sessions will probably be occupied with learning the Expand The Box skills of Centering, Conscious Feelings, Conscious Communications, Inner Navigation, Liquid States, etc.

       

      If your Client participates in a three-to-five-day Expand The Box training, and when possible, some Possibility Labs before coming to you, they will have already upgraded a lot of their Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware, and they will have Built Matrix to hold and apply their new awarenesses. This way they will more powerfully make use of the benefits of Possibility Coaching, Possibility Mediation, Possibility Psychology, Memetic Engineering, or Feelings Practitioner sessions with you.

    6. Demonstration Videos Team

      The four Possibility Coaches shown below have collected over 100 videos of actual Possibility Coaching sessions online. Their Clients have previously participated in at least one Expand The Box training, and perhaps also one or more Possibility Labs.

       

      Our purpose is to demonstrate the profound quality of healing and evolutionary steps which can be taken using the thoughtmaps, tools, distinctions, and processes of Possibility Management during Emotional Healing Processes. We want to widely share the treasures we have discovered to make them available for all of humanity.

       

      We are immensely grateful to the Clients for your courageous collaboration!

      Anne-Chloé Destremau

      http://annechloedestremau.org

      Nomadic.

      Clinton Callahan

      http://clintoncallahan.org

    7. Demonstration Videos Warnings

      We estimate that studying the videos shown below will be inestimably valuable both for professional Possibilitators, as well as for viewers who are on an authentic evolutionary Path.

      Possibility Coaches, Possibility Mediators, Possibility Psychologists, Memetic Engineers, Feelings Practitioners, and 3 Phase Healers may benefit from observing the applications of many Possibilitator distinctions, tools, and processes, including:

      • Holding Space and Navigating to Extraordinary Space
      • Distinguishing between Feelings and Emotions
      • Unmixing Emotions
      • Completing Incomplete Emotions
      • Speaking From The Unknown
      • Making Nonlinear and Unreasonable Offers
      • Using Vacuum Learning
      • Removing Blocks
      • Staying Unhookable
      • Distinguishing Low Drama from High Drama, and
      • Being the Space through which Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage can do their work in the world.

      Possibility Coaching Clients can observe the courage of so many individuals to face into the shadowy places in their psyche. By watching the videos you can accompany these Clients on their journey of Discovering what is really going on, while at the same time they Build Matrix to hold new skills, and gain Distinctions for transforming their hidden wounds into valuable milestones in their personal development Path.

      There is so much to gain from Decontaminating your Adult Ego State from Parental Voices, Childhood Fears, and Gremlin Shenanigans. A new future awaits you on the other side of every Doorway that is discovered and opened during your Emotional Healing Processes. Since each Process is unique and there is no 'method' in Possibility Coaching, you cannot predict (control) what will happen for you, but at the same time you can gain a sense of the value of Possibility Coaching.

      IMPORTANT NOTE: These videos are authentic unrehearsed personal healing and transformation processes. They are not recommended viewing for anyone under 18 years of age. If you watch any of these videos you are under your own recognizance. While watching any of these videos there is a good chance that you will feel something. We are, after all, human beings. We have 5 Bodies and so much in common that one person's trauma could easily remind you of your own traumatic life situations, even if you do not at this moment remember - and could never imagine - that such a thing might have happened to you.

      PLEASE DO NOT WATCH ANY OF THESE VIDEOS UNLESS YOU ARE AT LEAST 18 YEARS OLD, and until you take Radical Responsibility for your own Experiences, Stories, Reactivity, Feelings, Emotions, Projections, Beliefs, Expectations, Resentment, fears, memories, etc.

      You have now been warned.

      Thousands of people around the world have helped to develop these healing and transformational possibilities since 1975.

      Possibility Management is not a sect or a cult, a religion, a political party, a corporation, or a multilevel marketing scam.

      Possibilitator Training is an authentic Path of Adult and Archetypal Healing and Initiations... It is thoughtware for next culture - Archiarchy: the culture that naturally emerges after Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course.

      #120 Possibility Coaching demonstration - Bringing The Being Back Into The Body - coached by Clinton Callahan

      Client: "I don't know what's going on anymore, or what direction I need to turn. I don't know who I am anymore... As a child I was too much. My questions were a nuissance. I should not bother anyone. Nobody wanted what I had to offer. My birth ruined my family's life, so I had to rescue them by going away. There is no place for me to fit, so I put it all behind me."

      "How far behind you?"

      "Twenty meters..."

      "What is so important about your life mission that you had to survive your childhood at any cost, even by putting your Being twenty meters behind your body?"

      "To stop the war, between people and the Earth."

      "Are you ready to start?"

      (https://yourbeing.mystrikingly.com)

      https://youtu.be/ITXie-9zYKQ

    8. Demonstration Videos In Additional Languages

      (NOTE: These websites are not built yet. They are waiting for a Possibility Coaching Team in that language to take a stand for creating Possibility Coaching Demonstration Videos for your local Possibility Coaches. If you represent that Team, please write to clinton at nextculture dot org and we can start this conversation. Thank you!)

      Française / French

      Deutsch / German

      Italiano / Italian

      Polskie / Polish

      Português / Portuguese

      Español / Spanish

    9. Experiments For Creating Possibility

      Create The Possibility That Possibility Cannot Be Created

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.01

      For the next 7 days, refuse Possibility. Instead, saturate yourself in Resistance and bathe in it.

       

      Exaggerate your Reactivity. Amplify the scarcity of Possibility. Be in the small here and now with how things are, without trying to change them, without thinking about how to change them. Remain in the Low Drama desert of lovelessness and disconnected loneliness. Vehemently deny any and all Possibility that accidentally arises. Crush it with logic and reason. Scorn it to death.

       

      At the end of each day, for at least 20 minutes, write in your Beep! Book about doing this experiment. What did you notice today? How was it today? What happened with the other people around you today regarding your experiment?

       

      Write a 2 to 3 page mini-handbook for How to Avoid Possibility. Publish it as an article online.

       

      Then, enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 4 Matrix Points.

      Design A Possibility-Suppressing Government

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.02

      Get out your Beep! Book and design, on paper, a Possibility-suppressing government.

       

      What would the rules and laws be? How would the finances, taxes, police and military be? What would the voting system be? How would you track and punish violators who had too much Possibility?

       

      Design how it would go.

       

      What qualifications would there be for the leaders?

       

      When you have designed this, you can enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      Design A Possibility-Suppressing Education System

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.03

      Design, on paper, an education system to suppress Possibility.

       

      What would the rules be? How would it go? What would the qualifications be of the administrators and teachers? What would the controls, tests, punishments, and rewards be?

       

      When you have designed this, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      Design An Energetic Tool For Completely Escaping From A Possibility-Suppressing Game World

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.04

      Draw, on paper, an energetic tool that is for escaping a possibility-supressing regime, completely.

       

      Give it a name.

       

      Write an Instruction Handbook for how to use it.

       

      Then teach someone else to use it.

       

      Maybe teach your whole Possibility Team, and use the feedback from teaching them to refine your tool.

       

      Then, use this new tool everywhere for a whole week, in every conversation, interaction and situation, use it to the edge of being fanatical.

       

      Don't get arrested.

       

      At the end of the week, for at least 20 minutes, write in your Beep! Book about doing this experiment. Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 4 Matrix Points.

      Pay Attention To Possibility Part 1

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.05

      Start paying (more) attention to Possibility.

       

      For one week, sit down three times a day with your Beep! Book and scan the past few hours for three things that happened, and notice the Possibilities you missed about those three things.

       

      For example, when you got home, what Possibilities did you miss? When you ate a sandwich?

       

      At the end of the week, for at least 20 minutes, go over what you wrote during the week and write a summary in your Beep! Book about doing this Experiment.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      Pay Attention To Possibility Part 2

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.06

      For one week, again sit down three times a day with your Beep! Book and notice the possibilities that exist, that are happening in the small here and now that you didn't notice until you sat down and gave your attention.

       

      At the end of the week, for at least 30 minutes, go over what you wrote during the week and write a summary in your Beep! Book about doing this Experiment.

       

      Then, enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      Build And Honor An Altar To Possibility

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.07

      Build a small altar in your room to the Bright Principle of Possibility.

       

      When you have kept your altar to Possibility clean and alive for one month, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.07 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Become A Possibilitator Part 1

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.08

      For one week, in every new space that you are in, alone and with other people, consider that there are always (at least) three Possibilities that are not considered in the space.

       

      Bring three Possibilities forth by stating them out loud, clearly.

       

      For example, you could start with:

      "We could go... We could do this... We could rearrange the furniture... We could ask another person for feedback... We could clean the windows... We could get up and wrestle for three minutes."

       

      At the end of the week, for at least 20 minutes, write about doing this experiment in your Beep! Book.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Become A Possibilitator Part 2

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.09

      For this experiment, at the beginning of each interaction you have with somebody for a week, the first words you say are:

      "I am a Possibilitator, and I can prove it. Ask me for Possibilities and I deliver three of them in less than three minutes."

      This is not brain storming, by the way. This is removing blocks, and reinventing world views.

      Keep track of the Possibilities you create in your Beep! Book. At the end of the week, count them up and consider which Possibilities you might use for yourself.

      Then enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Scan For Invisible People

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.10

      You are unconsciously Scanning the Matrix of people all the time.

       

      It is one of your primary forms of entertainment.

       

      However, in this experiment, for one week, instead of Scanning for people who you have resonance with or you are attracted to, Scan for people who are invisible to you.

       

      Then go over and meet them. Tell them, "I was Scanning your Matrix and there are parts I cannot see. Could you please explain this to me?"

       

      At the end of each day of this experiment, write about your encounters with at least 7 people, in your Beep! Book.

       

      At the end of the week, for at least 20 minutes, go over what you wrote during the week and write a summary about doing this experiment.

       

      Then you can enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.10 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      Study Possibility At Your Possibility Team

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.11

      Most people don't really know what Possibility is or how to relate to it. Creating Possibility is a soft skill technology with many Distinctions.

       

      With your Possibility Team (or another Team), have a meeting dedicated to Studying Possibility.

       

      Read the whole first part of this Create Possibility website together, and practice implementing some of the distinctions.

       

      Have space for questions, comments, sharing.

       

      Formulate 3 questions from the study period and contact one of the Possibility Trainers listed in the Demo Team section of this website and ask them your 3 questions during an interview that you record with them.

       

      Share the interview especially with your Possibility Team.

       

      Then everyone in your Possibility Team can enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.11 in their free accounts at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      Find And Study Your Thoughtmaps About Possibility

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.12

      Your Thoughtmaps determine what is possible for you. A Thoughtmap is neither good or bad. Yet certain Thoughtmaps can limit Possibility while other Thoughtmaps can broaden it.

       

      For this Experiment, each day for one week, stop while you are doing something and find and study the Thoughtmap you have for doing it. To find your Thoughtmaps, Split Your Attention and use Self Observation to Notice the way you perceive things that you perceive in your life.

       

      In other words, pick a moment and relate to it so that your Thoughtmap can be found and studied.

       

      For example: When you grab your lunch, look at it. Consider how are you relating to your lunch and to food? Are you living alone because you are scared somebody is going to eat what you like before you can? Do you not even relate to your lunch because you don't really want to be alive while eating? Is your mother still deciding what you to eat? What else are you doing that she is still deciding? What inner map is at work?

       

      At the end of each day for the week, for at least 10 minutes, write about the time you did this during the day in your Beep! Book. On the last day, write for another 10 minutes about doing this Experiment.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.12 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 4 Matrix Points.

      Interview Your Mother or One of Your School Teachers

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.13

      Other people see things that you cannot about how you notice and receive possibility. They always have.

       

      Arrange an online-or-offline interview with your mother, or with one of your school teachers, and ask them several times the same question:

       

      "Please explain to me 3 possibilities that you tried to give to me that I was not able to make use of, or that I refused to make use of."

       

      Find several ways to ask.

       

      Then ask, "What do you think were my blocks to getting each of these possibilities? Do you think I still have the blocks?"

       

      Take notes, or record the interview, if you can. After, read over your notes or listen to the interview again. Share what you learned in your Possibility Team.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Interview Your Father or Your Boss

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.14

      Different kinds of people can see and have seen different aspects of you and how you see, do not se, receive and do not receive possibility.

       

      Arrange an on or offline interview with your Father or boss (even if they are a woman) and ask them to tell you about 3 possibilities that they tried to give to you that you were not able to make use of or that you refused to make use of.

       

      "What three possibilities have you offered to me that I have not taken advantage of, that I did not follow?"

       

      Then ask them, "Why do you think I could not or did not do it? What was or is my block? Do you think I still have it?"

       

      Take notes, or record the interview, if you can. After, read over your notes or listen to the interview again. Share what you learned in your Possibility Team.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Create and Occupy a Possibility Café

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.15

      How places are set up, in all forms, affect how possibility happens in a space.

       

      Do this experiment with a friend.

       

      Next time you go into a café, talk with your friend and document in detail in your Beep! Book about exactly how the café could be set up differently, in all forms, that would create more possibility for everybody, the manger, owner, clients, suppliers, etc.

       

      In terms of tables, money, things that happen, what other things could happen there, and how for this to be possible, what would need to change?

       

      When you have that written up, send it to clinton@nextculture.org so he can put it on the Possibility Café website.

       

      When you have done that, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.15 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Take Radical Responsibility for Possibility

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.16

      For one week, be the personal representative for the Bright Principle of Possibility in every space. If anyone wants Possibility, they talk to YOU.

       

      Wear a name tag that says, "I AM Possibility." When you introduce yourself, say your name and then say, "I AM the personal representative of the Bright Principle of Possibility in this space."

       

      At the end of the week, for at least 20 minutes, write a summary in your Beep! Book about doing this experiment; remember the ways you articulated the Bright Principe of Possibility, and the ways you took Radical Responsibility for Possibility.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.16 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Try a Session of Possibility Coaching for Yourself

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.17

      Go to the Possibility Coaching website, and choose one of the coaches. Arrange to have a Possibility Coaching session with that person about what blocks you from creating Possibility for yourself, or what blocks you from generously creating Possibility for others.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.17 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      Write an Article About Your Possibility Coaching

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.18

      After doing Experiment CRE8POSS.17 above, write an article about your experiences during your Possibility Coaching session and publish it on Medium.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.18 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Point.

      Create Possibility Using: "What If...?" Questions

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.19

      For one week, once a day, start one conversation that begins with "What if...?"

       

      Not an intellectual something like, "What if the earth did not spin?"

       

      Remember, Possibility is about measurable and real options.

       

      Instead use conversation starters such as:

      • "What if you were the President?"
      • "What if you knew you would die tomorrow?"
      • "What if you won a million Euros?"
      • "What would you do differently if all your problems were solved?"

      At the end of the week, for at least 30 minutes, write about doing this experiment in your Beep! Book.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.19 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      What Would Your Expert Possibilitators Do?

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.20

      Make a list of 12 of your personal favorite Possibilitators of all time (including fictional characters) in your Beep! Book.

       

      Choose 3 of them and memorize their names, 1, 2, 3.

       

      For the next month, whenever a problem or conflict arises, shift identity into the first of the three of your hero Possibilitators, speaking and acting as them for 3 minutes.

       

      Then shift into the second, for 3 more minutes, and then into the third for 3 more minutes.

       

      Don't tell anybody what you are doing.

       

      For example, if you chose Clinton, Black Widow, and Lazarus Long, the hashtag for your first three minutes would be #WWCD (what would Clinton do?) and your next three minutes, #WWBWD and finally #WWLLD

       

      At the end of each week during this month, for at least 30 minutes, write about doing this experiment in your Beep! Book.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.20 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This month-long Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      Create A Wild Ass Problem For Yourself

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.21

      In order to have Wild Ass Possibility you have to have Wild Ass Problems.

       

      People are so vanilla about their problems. If you want to see what Wild Ass Problems are, watch the Salvation TV series.

       

      This Experiment will help get you into the habit of creating Wild Ass Problems.

       

      For this Experiment, write the 10 Wild Ass Problems that most touch you into your Beep! Book.

       

      For example: Stop Lithium Mining. Create a Million United Regenerative Nanonations. Shift from Industrial Agriculture Food Production to Local Food. Take All Kids Out of School.

       

      Create your list of 10 Wild Ass Problems and tell them to people.

       

      Choose two of your Wild Ass Problems, combine them together into one bigger Wild Ass Problem, and Become Committed to solving it.

       

      For this whole month, wherever you go, tell people you are commitment to solving this Wild Ass Problem and ask them for possibilities. Write down what they say in your Beep! Book.

       

      Come up with 5 experiments to try towards solving your big Wild Ass Problem.

       

      Bring together your Team and try 3 of these Experiments.

       

      Then, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.21 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      Create Too Many Possibilities For Yourself

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.22

      Create that the problem in your life is that you have too many possibilities. Make it the biggest problem in your life that you have too many possibilities.

       

      Every day for a week, write for at least 20 minutes in your Beep! Book what you have too many possibilities about.

       

      At the end of the week, enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.22 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Kill A Few Extraneous Possibilities In Your Life

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.23

      The possessions that you have give you possibilities.

       

      Pick up each object in your house and decide to get rid of the Possibility that that thing offers you, particularly if it the possibility has to do with pride, guilt, shame, nostalgia, resentment, trying to be a rescuer, or having shame about being a rescuer.

       

      If anything in your house gives you the possibility of any of that, kill that possibility by disposing of the object.

       

      Do this with every single object in your house.

       

      You might find your Sword of Clarity useful for this experiment.

       

      When you have picked up every object in your house and donated or disposed of the ones you do not want to continue to possess, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.23 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      Fertilize A Possibility Garden

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.24

      People usually think they need Possibilities to kill problems. This Experiment is about using problems to create Possibilities.

       

      Organize a 3 or 4 hours party called a 'Possibility Garden', and invite people to bring 'fertilizer' for the Possibility Garden. Give them examples of what that 'fertilizer' might be.

       

      Limit the size of your party to 18 people, (no children, or you won't get to the second part of the experiment.)

       

      Invite those who come to the Possibility Garden to write or paint little pictures of their problems on pieces of paper and put it on the ground.

       

      Then, as a group, go around and 'pick' the problems - as if they were flowers in a garden - that you will use to as fertilizer to create Possibilities.

       

      Encourage Teams to form to weave 2 or 3 problems together in one part of the garden to make the Possibility grow better.

       

      After the Possibility Garden Party, each person who participated can enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.24 in their free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      Remove All Your Clocks and Mirrors

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.25

      There are lots of ways to keep Possibility from happening. One is to rely on technology, even simple technology. This Experiment will make a difference about that for you.

       

      Remove the mirrors and time keeping devices from your living spaces for one entire month.

       

      This will mean you take possession of your inner Possibility clock, which will start telling you the right time to do the right thing. You are not looking at the mirror to check who you are, you are not looking at the clock to tell you where to be, what to do.

       

      Live for a month, using your inner Possibility clock, so that what is developed is a sense of the right time and Possibility for living.

       

      Use your inner Possibility mirror, to sense how you want to show up in your life.

       

      You might wear your pajamas all day or eat dinner in the morning, go swimming in the middle of the night; do what your rightful sense of Possibility is telling you.

       

      SIDE NOTE: if you start having fears about being seen as crazy by other people, call up your Possibility Team or create a 3 Cell to get Emotional Healing Processes or Possibility Coaching so you can keep going.

       

      When the month is finished, you can decide to replace the clocks and mirrors or not, but either way, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.25 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      Intentionally Cause Emotional Reactivity In Yourself

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.26

      One way we avoid Possibility is by keeping our lives safe and predictable.

       

      This Experiment is about doing something differently, by going into dangerous situations.

       

      How you do this experiment will depend on you. Depending on which ways you are bigoted and have prejudices, go into a Mexican Bar or a white supremacist's church service, or a board meeting for a big corporation.

       

      Make sure it will be somewhere that you could easily be Hooked, or where you could easily have emotional Reactivity.

       

      Observe yourself while you are in these places. Clearly document each Reactivity impulse immediately in your Beep! Book so that you can find your way back to the Button, Hook, Trigger, Trauma, Imbalance, or Voice. Treasure your Reactivity. Collect your Reactivity as jewels, so you can go back to them and use them as Doorways for Emotional Healing Processes.

       

      For example, then you ask your EHP Spaceholder to read from your Beep! Book and say, "You are a fat Gringo-lover," to easily follow your Reactivity back to where it is coming from.

       

      When you have visited 5 different dangerous places and done 5 Emotional Healing Processes, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.26 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      Create Possibilities For Loving People More

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.27

      There are always more Possibilities for loving more people, and for loving each one of them more.

       

      This experiment is about creating Possibilities for love.

       

      To begin, give somebody a thousand Euros, and promise them: "If I complete this experiment, give the money back to me. And if I don't, keep it."

       

      Then, commit to loving people for the whole month. Commit to finding ways to love. You will need possibilities for finding ways to love your neighbor who is playing saxophone in the middle of the night, your mother in law who picks her nose and makes you eat those butterscotch cookies you hate.

       

      When you go back to the person who has your 1000 Euros, tell them all about your month of loving people. Whether or not they give you back your 1000 Euros, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.27 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      Create Possibility By Repackaging The Story About What Is Happening So As To Shift The Space

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.28

      The Space determines what is Possible, so it is important to consciously Navigate to the specific Space that offers the Possibility that is needed. So often the Space you are Holding can drift into another Purpose, another Context, a Low Drama, or simply Confusion.

       

      Why does this happen? Because so many forces are unconsciously at work trying to invisibly maintain an imagined 'normality'.

       

      Ordinary Spaces and S.H.I.T. Thoughtware may seem attractive to you because your uninitiated preferences come from your Box, your Gremlin, your Shadow Principles, and possibly some Vampire Entities you carry around with you that feed on you like you feed on pigs, chickens, cows, goats and sheep.

       

      How can you take back and reformat the original context of the Space? Through Repackaging.

       

      This Experiment is to, three times each day for the next 2 weeks, Repackage the Space, even if you think you are stating the obvious. Say what you are doing there together with other people as a way of creating the Clarity needed to create the Possibility needed. You Repackage so as to catalyze the emergence of Possibility.

       

      Once each day write down the most effective Repackaging you did that day into your Beep! Book. By the end of the 2 weeks you will have 14 stories of a situation that was occurring, a Repackaging that you made, and the outcome it created. This is the stuff of Legend Making!

       

      Choose your three most Legendary Repackaging interventions, and during your next Possibility Team, report on your Repackaging Experiments, and ask for feedback and coaching about your Legend Making.

       

      After you practice Legend Making at your Possibility Team , please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.28 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      Create Possibility Through Radical Experimenting

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.29

      Go for 31 days and nights without eating, drinking, wearing, or using ANYTHING that is derived from pigs, chickens, cows, goats, or sheep. Do it. No feather pillows, wool jackets, leather belts or shoes, leather-covered couches or chairs, not even a 'pigskin' football. Do not touch our use anything. Nothing.

       

      When anyone questions your actions simply tell them, "I am an Experimenter. Right now I am doing Experiment CRE8POSS.29 from the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline matrix-building personal-transformation thoughtware-upgrade adventure-game called StartOver.xyz," and ask them if they would like to do this Experiment with you.

       

      This Experiment is to boldly do your Experiment in public, meaning to do your Experiment without trying to hide your 'unusual' or 'changed' behaviors. (This does NOT mean doing your Experiment so that your Gremlin can feed by seeming to be 'weird', 'strange', 'unique', or 'eccentric'.) By doing your Experimenting in public you bring your 'culture of experimentation' to life in the world. This gives the people around you inspiration for doing their own Experiments. At least they can see that being an Experimenter in public is possible.

       

      Perhaps your culture of Experimenting is only alive in the Bubble Of Space that you move around inside of and no one even notices that you are Experimenting. Nonetheless, you are Building Matrix by being courageous to carry on with your Bubble of Experimenting Culture rather than Being Culturally Adaptive to the sleeping Zombie culture which may be all around you.

       

      After the 31 days of not eating, drinking, wearing, or using anything derived from pigs, chickens, cows, goats, or sheep, please enter Matrix Code CRE8POSS.29 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 16 Matrix Points.

      Meta-Watch 25 Demonstration Videos In A Team

      Matrix Code CRE8POSS.30

      Watch 25 Create Possibility videos with a 'meta-view', which means without getting 'hooked' in the process of the clients, and in a Team of at least 2 people.
       
      You need your Beep! Book to do this experiment. Start a new page titled "Create Possibility Meta-View".
       

      Your experiment is to notice and write down as many dimensions, moves, nonlinear gestures, space shifts, sideway questions, thoughtware upgrades, etc... as you can.

       

      Especially, notice when:

      • The coach shifts from letting the client into their feelings/emotions into using the feelings/emotions for transformation.
      • What questions are been asked?
      • What does the coach notice?
      • Where is the coach looking?
      • What distinctions are being used?
      • What are your fears and blocks that prevent you to ask these questions? Or notice what there is to notice?
      Either while you are watching the video, or at the end of the video, consult with your Team about what you have notices, what they noticed and what questions you have or they have.

       

      In addition to the matrix point that you get watching each of the Create Possibility Coaching videos, register Matrix Code CRE8POSS.30 in your free account at StartOver.xyz after you have been the Spaceholder for your Team to meta-watched 25 of the Create Possibility videos. This Experiment is worth 25 Matrix Points for the Spaceholder.

    10.  
       
       
       
       
       
       
       
       
       
       
       
       
       

       
       

    11. StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code CRE8POSS.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
